app.name: Norevia
app.description: Compare destinations through verifiable evidence, your priorities, and visible data quality.

overview.title: A clearer way to choose where you belong.
overview.lead: Norevia turns official destination data into a personal, explainable comparison—without hiding gaps or uncertainty.
overview.traceabilityText: Every value retains its producer, period, retrieval date, method, geography and transformations.
overview.personalText: Your life project determines the importance of education, housing, mobility and more.
overview.honestText: Destination score, data coverage and confidence stay visibly separate.
overview.scopeText: 50 carefully governed indicators for German states and major cities, ready to expand internationally.

profile.title: Tell us what a good life looks like
profile.intro: Your answers shape filters and explanations. They stay on this device until account synchronization is configured.
profile.name: Profile name

priorities.title: Distribute your 100 priority points
priorities.intro: A higher value gives that category more influence. Missing evidence lowers coverage; it is never treated as zero.

compare.title: Compare up to four destinations
compare.intro: Scores use observations from the same reference year and comparable peer group whenever available.
compare.empty: No official observations have been published to this environment yet.
compare.emptyHelp: The catalog and locations are ready, but rankings remain empty until validated source imports are approved.
compare.officialOnly: Only official evidence contributes to this score.
compare.nationalWarning: This value is available only at national level and is explicitly discounted.
compare.offline: Showing a saved comparison from this device.
compare.maximum: You can select up to four destinations.

methodology.title: A score you can inspect
methodology.lead: Norevia is decision support—not a universal best-city list.
methodology.normalizationText: Values are capped at the peer group's 5th and 95th percentiles, then normalized from 0 to 100 by year and geography.
methodology.weightingText: Indicator score × personal weight × confidence coefficient, divided by quality-adjusted available weight.
methodology.separationText: Official observations, representative surveys, resident perception and user reports remain separate.
methodology.racismTitle: A necessary warning about discrimination data
methodology.racismText: More recorded complaints do not necessarily mean more racism. They can also indicate better recognition, easier reporting or stronger institutions. Norevia therefore exposes each dimension and source rather than merging them into one unexplained number.
methodology.freshnessText: Observed period, publication date and retrieval date are retained independently. New import does not mean new observation.

saved.title: Offline comparisons
saved.empty: No comparison has been saved on this device.

notifications.unsupported: Notifications are not supported on this device.

errors.network: The data service is unavailable. Check your connection or use a saved comparison.
